label: Congestion Pricing
description: Charges peak-hour road usage in the city center to reduce traffic and fund transit improvements.
stakeholder_reaction_on: Transit Riders: 'Fewer cars on the road means buses actually run on time now.' Drivers' Association: 'This is a tax on anyone who can't afford to live near the metro.'
stakeholder_reaction_off: Drivers' Association: 'At last — the city is treating drivers like citizens again.'
